summary: Fixed edge-to-edge canvas fit by making grid spacing responsive to viewport dimensions and changing all zoomToFit calls to use padding 0

changes.spacing_formula: Added dimensionsRef to track viewport at data-fetch time. Spacing now calculated as: spacingX = max(200, dimensionsRef.current.width * 0.85 / (cols - 1)), spacingY = max(150, dimensionsRef.current.height * 0.85 / (rows - 1))
changes.zoomToFit_settings: All three zoomToFit calls now use padding 0 instead of 5 or 10: line 370 (initial auto-fit useEffect), line 568 (handleResetView function), line 1169 (onEngineStop callback)

notes_for_orchestrator: The root cause was threefold: (1) grid spacing was hardcoded to 300x250 regardless of viewport, (2) dimensionsRef was missing so data fetch couldn't use real viewport dimensions, (3) multiple zoomToFit calls had inconsistent padding values (some 5, some 10). All three issues have been fixed. Verified build passes, synced to prod, and restarted service.
